name: Credit Repair Solutions Bronx NY
description_short: Arms Credit Solutions offers credit report dispute and repair services in Bronx, NY, claiming 28 years of experience and typical results within 45 days.
description_long:
Arms Credit Solutions, operating under Arms Capital Partners, is a credit repair company serving the Bronx, NY area. According to their website, they have 28 years of experience helping individuals and small businesses improve their credit scores through error disputes and strategic credit remediation. The company positions itself as a middleman that works with a network of third-party experts to assess credit situations and identify inaccuracies on credit reports.

The company's primary service is credit report dispute and correction. They claim to evaluate credit histories, identify and dispute incorrect information, and prioritize actions that will improve credit scores fastest. They offer personalized assessments for both individual consumers and small business owners, with stated typical timelines of 45 days to see results. They also provide credit-checking services and guidance on credit score improvement strategies, including debt paydown and payment timing.

Arms Credit Solutions distinguishes itself through longevity claims (28 years in business) and specific performance metrics—they state they've seen credit score increases as large as 200+ points depending on circumstances. They emphasize a consultative approach with free initial consultations and position credit repair as having broad financial impact (jobs, insurance, security clearances). Their phone number (718-518-0110) is prominently featured, suggesting a call-center-based service model.

A critical caveat: The website makes broad performance claims (200+ point increases, 45-day results) without disclaimers about variability, legal limitations, or the fact that credit repair companies cannot remove accurate negative information. The site lacks transparency about pricing, specific dispute methodology, or independent verification of their 28-year history. No business registration details, licensing information, or regulatory compliance statements are provided. The vague reference to "expert third-party partners" raises questions about who actually performs the work and what oversight exists.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers free initial consultation before committing to services
Claims 28 years of business experience in credit repair
Serves both individual consumers and small business clients
States typical results visible within 45 days
Provides credit-checking and monitoring services for businesses
Emphasizes legal compliance training (recent laws and statutes)
Offers personalized assessment rather than one-size-fits-all approach
cons: No pricing information provided on website—costs and fee structure completely opaque
Makes unqualified performance claims (200+ point increases, 45-day results) without explaining variability or legal limits
No licensing, registration, or regulatory compliance information displayed; unclear if CROA-compliant
Vague about actual service delivery—credits work to unnamed 'third-party partners' rather than transparent staff
No independent reviews, testimonials, or verifiable track record provided on website
best_for: Individuals with errors or inaccuracies on their credit reports seeking dispute assistance
Small business owners wanting to improve business credit scores for better loan terms
Consumers in Bronx, NY area preferring local phone-based service (718 area code)
diagnosis: Best for Bronx-area residents with legitimate credit report errors who prefer phone-based service and want professional dispute assistance. Main caveat: Website lacks pricing transparency, regulatory compliance documentation, and makes performance claims without appropriate legal disclaimers—verify licensing and fees before engaging.
services: Credit report dispute and error correction
Credit score checking services for individuals
Business credit monitoring and checking services
Guidance on debt paydown and payment strategies
Expert third-party credit evaluation network access
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
